---
title: "report_engine.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\core\report_engine.py"
loc: 43
complexity: 6
logic_score: 7.27
style_score: 3.93
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 5.38
---

## Intent
The `report_engine.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on ReportEngine, __init__, header, section, verdict, signature, generate_report. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via ReportEngine, __init__, header, section, verdict, signature, generate_report. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 20 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [datetime](file://datetime)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [utils](file://utils)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)

### Exports
- `ReportEngine`
- `__init__`
- `header`
- `section`
- `verdict`
- `signature`
- `generate_report`
